desc.en: Lisbon Metro is the first subway system in Portugal. It was put into operation on December 29, 1959. At present, it has four lines: Blue Line, Yellow Line, Green Line and Red Line, covering Lisbon's main urban areas and airports, with an average daily passenger flow of more than 500,000. The subway operates from 06:30 to 01:00 the next day, with a total length of about 44.5 kilometres and 56 stations.
desc.zh: 里斯本地铁是葡萄牙首个地铁系统，于1959年12月29日开通运营，目前拥有蓝线、黄线、绿线和红线4条线路，覆盖里斯本主要城区及机场，日均客流量已超过50万人次。地铁运营时间为每日06:30至次日01:00，线路总长约44.5公里，设56个车站。
